subject: Hospitals and Health Care Facilities
bill.title: Hospitals and Health Care Facilities - As introduced, lowers the age of an inpatient from 65 to 50 or older when a hospital, each year from October 1 through March 1, must offer immunization against influenza disease prior to discharge; requires a hospital to offer immunization against pneumococcal disease to an inpatient aged 50 or older prior to discharge. - Amends TCA Title 68.

action.description: Passed on Second Consideration, refer to Senate Health and Welfare Committee
